title: EpistemicFactKG Unified Claim v2.0
description: Unified schema for Pramana-labelled fact verification claims. Supports AI2THOR (simulation, structured triples) and AVeriTeC (real-world text, unstructured evidence). GNN models unify at the epistemic layer via pramana_primary.

pramana_type.description: Six Pramana categories. Confidence midpoints: perception=0.90, non_apprehension=0.80, testimony=0.85, comparison_analogy=0.75, inference=0.70, postulation_derivation=0.60

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: {dataset}-{split}-{index} e.g. averitec-train-000001, ai2thor-FloorPlan1-001

claim.description: The natural language claim to be verified.

label.description: Verification outcome. 'not_enough_evidence' is AVeriTeC-specific (insufficient textual sources). 'non_apprehension' is an epistemic category, not a verdict label.

epistemic.description: Pramana-based epistemic classification. pramana_primary is the GNN unification point — all records share this regardless of source dataset.

pramana_primary.description: Dominant Pramana category. Used as the shared EpistemicNode type in the GNN graph.

pramana_all.description: All applicable Pramana categories (multi-label). Sorted by PRIMARY_ORDER.

confidence_weight.description: Epistemic reliability prior used as edge weight in GNN. Derived from pramana_primary midpoint: perception=0.90, testimony=0.85, non_apprehension=0.80, comparison_analogy=0.75, inference=0.70, postulation_derivation=0.60

assignment_method.description: How the Pramana label was assigned. 'heuristic'=auto converter logic, 'rule_based'=deterministic rules from simulation, 'annotated'=human.

claim_triples.description: Structured [subject, predicate, object] triples representing the claim. Populated for AI2THOR (ground-truth simulation state). Null for AVeriTeC. Used to build EntityNodes and predicate edges in the GNN.

reasoning.description: Claim generation metadata. Populated for AI2THOR. Null for AVeriTeC.

structural.description: How the claim was constructed relative to the knowledge graph.

strategy.description: Verification strategy required to resolve the claim.

evidence.description: Evidence items supporting or refuting the claim. For AI2THOR: one item per sensor observation with ground-truth triples. For AVeriTeC: one item per QA answer (text flattened from question+answer).

evidence_id.description: Stable unique ID. Format: {claim_id}-e{n} for AI2THOR, {claim_id}-q{n}-a{n} for AVeriTeC.

text.description: Natural language evidence text. For AVeriTeC: concatenated QA answer text. For AI2THOR: human-readable description of sensor observation.

triples.description: Structured triples for this evidence item. Populated for AI2THOR (ground_truth). Null for AVeriTeC unless extraction is run (extracted).

triple_source.description: 'ground_truth'=from simulation state (AI2THOR), 'extracted'=from NLP extraction on text, null=no triples.

stance.description: 'absent' is used exclusively for Anupalabdhi (non_apprehension) claims where the sensor confirmed the object/property does not exist.

source_url.description: URL or URI of the evidence source. e.g. 'ai2thor://scene/FloorPlan1' or a web URL.

provenance.description: Origin of the record. Used for dataset analysis and ablation studies, not by the GNN model.

dataset.description: Source dataset or simulator identifier. Use lowercase letters, digits, underscores only. e.g. ai2thor, averitec, fever, habitat.

context_id.description: Scene ID for AI2THOR (e.g. 'FloorPlan1') or corpus ID for AVeriTeC (e.g. 'schlichtkrull2023averitec').

created_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of record creation.
